channel.title: Gloam Updates (Windows)
channel.description: Most recent updates for Gloam on Windows

item.title: Version 0.2.0
item.description:
Gloam 0.2.0

  • Voice channels with LiveKit integration
  • Explore room browser with server switching
  • User profile modals with DM initiation
  • Self-profile editing with avatar upload
  • Room invite flow with accept/decline
  • Per-room notification settings
  • 15 keyboard shortcuts with platform-aware help
